docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF ERMATINGER, ROBERT RUSSELL AS TO DEFENDANT HOSPITALITY PRO SEARCH, A TEXAS LIMITED PARTNERSHIP JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ERMATINGER, ROBERT RUSSELL RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HOSPITALITY PRO SEARCH, A TEXAS LIMITED PARTNERSHIP $8,060.30 PRINCIPAL, $92.98 INTEREST, $180.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $8,333.28, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
